repos.name: skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.descEn: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.descKo: 실제 엔지니어를 위한 기술. 내 .agents 디렉토리에서 바로.

repos.name: hallmark
repos.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
repos.descEn: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
repos.descKo: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex의 AI 슬롭 방지 설계 스킬입니다.

repos.name: awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.descEn: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.descKo: 실제로 실행할 수 있는 100개 이상의 AI 에이전트 및 RAG 앱 — 복제, 사용자 정의, 출시.

repos.name: build-your-own-x
repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.descEn: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.descKo: 좋아하는 기술을 처음부터 다시 만들어 프로그래밍을 마스터하세요.

repos.name: OfficeCLI
repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descEn: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descKo: OfficeCLI는 AI 에이전트가 Word, Excel 및 PowerPoint 파일을 읽고 편집하고 자동화할 수 있도록 특별히 제작된 최초이자 최고의 Office 제품군입니다. 무료, 오픈 소스, 단일 바이너리, Office 설치가 필요하지 않습니다.

repos.name: code-review-graph
repos.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
repos.descEn: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
repos.descKo: MCP 및 CLI에 대한 로컬 우선 코드 인텔리전스 그래프. 리뷰 및 대규모 리포지토리 워크플로에 대한 벤치마킹된 컨텍스트 감소를 통해 AI 코딩 도구가 중요한 내용만 읽을 수 있도록 코드베이스의 지속적인 맵을 구축합니다.

repos.name: pi
repos.description: AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI
repos.descEn: AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI
repos.descKo: AI 에이전트 툴킷: 통합 LLM API, 에이전트 루프, TUI, 코딩 에이전트 CLI

repos.name: openinterpreter
repos.description: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
repos.descEn: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
repos.descKo: Kimi K3와 같은 개방형 모델용 코딩 에이전트

repos.name: codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.descEn: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

repos.name: archify
repos.description: Any agent Skill: generate beautiful architecture diagrams with dark/light theme toggle and PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG export
repos.descEn: Any agent Skill: generate beautiful architecture diagrams with dark/light theme toggle and PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG export
repos.descKo: 모든 에이전트 기술: 어두운/밝은 테마 전환 및 PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG 내보내기를 사용하여 아름다운 아키텍처 다이어그램 생성

repos.name: destructive_command_guard
repos.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
repos.descEn: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
repos.descKo: Destructive Command Guard(dcg)는 위험한 git 및 셸 명령이 에이전트에 의해 실행되는 것을 차단하기 위한 것입니다.

repos.name: cangjie-skill
repos.description: 把书、长视频、播客等高价值内容蒸馏成可执行的 Agent Skills
repos.descEn: 把书、长视频、播客等高价值内容蒸馏成可执行的 Agent Skills
repos.descKo: 把书、长视频、播客等高价值内容蒸馏成可执行的 에이전트 스킬

repos.name: kimi-cli
repos.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
repos.descEn: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
